sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this sports game

special_mechanics.name: Nasty Audibles
special_mechanics.description: Dirty, violent special plays including exploding balls, invisibility, electric shocks, jet packs, and targeted quarterback tackling

special_mechanics.name: Environmental Hazards
special_mechanics.description: Landmines, fire pits, open spaces, and field material variations (rock, ice, toxic waste, rubber) affect player movement and health

special_mechanics.name: Player Elimination
special_mechanics.description: Players can lose health or die during play, causing fumbles. Killing enough opposing players causes team forfeit

tier_notes: Tier 2: No specific physics parameters documented. Game uses John Madden Football '93 engine as foundation but focuses on gameplay mechanics over precise movement physics. Available sources provide gameplay overview and historical context only, not technical physics data.
